_comment: EN messages · anti-spam compliant per docs/anti-spam-positioning.md. Mirror this to zh/tw/ja with same key set. ZERO trigger words (astrology / horoscope / zodiac / fortune / destiny / cosmic blueprint / star palace / mystical / divination / fate) outside of explicit-negation context. Lead vocabulary: BaZi, Four Pillars, ZiWei, Twelve Palaces, decade cycle, classical Chinese cosmology, AI personality framework, educational, chart, configuration.

meta.title: HexAstral — BaZi · ZiWei · AI
meta.description: Yuel and Yuun — educational BaZi and Chinese almanac tools with AI-assisted classical chart reading. Not predictive.

landing.heroSub: Generate your BaZi chart in 60 seconds. AI-augmented insights grounded in over a millennium of classical Chinese cosmology.
landing.heroNote: No signup · 60-second chart · 3 chat credits on first reading

features.title: BaZi (Four Pillars)
features.desc: Precision charting of your Four Pillars (八字). Decode your Day Master, Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches (天干地支), and the I Ching (八卦) hexagram tied to your moment of birth.

features.title: ZiWei (Twelve Palaces)
features.desc: All 12 palaces decoded through ZiWei Dou Shu (紫微斗数). Decade cycles and annual element flows mapped against classical configurations.

features.title: Decade Cycles & Configurations
features.desc: 10-year decade cycle mapped against classical configurations — surfaces the opportunities and constraints at each life stage.

features.title: Element Compatibility
features.desc: Dual chart synthesis through the Five Elements (五行) framework — surfaces connection, attraction, and sources of friction between two people.

landing.convBody:
To understand yourself? To see a relationship more clearly? To make sense of a chapter in your life that was unusually hard?
Whatever it is, your chart has structure worth reading.

testimonials.text: "You're a wild horse at heart, but reality has kept you in a stable" — I cried reading that.
testimonials.name: C.W.

testimonials.text: The compatibility report helped me finally understand, through the Five Elements lens, why we always fight over the exact same thing.
testimonials.name: L.H.

testimonials.text: The decade cycle timeline made everything click — I finally understood why 2024 was so brutal. I'd just entered a new cycle.
testimonials.name: Kevin W.

landing.ctaSub: Download HexAstral — unlock AI deep reading, decade cycle timelines & configuration analysis on your first chart

loading._comment: Procedural-tone loading messages. NO 'celestial alignments', 'vibrations', 'cosmic energy patterns' — those read as mystical. All replaced with computation-language.

dayMaster.metaTitle: Day Master calculator (Ba Zi 八字 lite) — HexAstral
dayMaster.metaDescription: Approximate Four Pillars and Day Master stem for educational preview. Full chart in Yuel.
dayMaster.heading: Day Master preview · 八字
dayMaster.intro: Your Day Master (日元) is the stem of the day pillar — the backbone of a Ba Zi chart, comparable to a sun-sign anchor in Western typing systems, but grounded in Five Elements.
dayMaster.disclaimer: Uses simplified Gan Zhi boundaries (Gregorian approximation). Yuel applies solar terms, optional true solar time, and lunar conversion for production readings.
dayMaster.ctaHeadline: Full Four Pillars + Zi Wei in Yuel
dayMaster.ctaSub: Birth city, true solar correction, and fused AI reading — the Yuel flagship app.

hexagram.metaTitle: 64 I Ching hexagrams index — Zhou Yi reference
hexagram.metaDescription: Browse the King Wen sequence with Chinese names. Commentary from the HexAstral knowledge base.
hexagram.heading: I Ching · 周易 hexagram index
hexagram.intro: Each entry links to commentary suited for study. Three-coin Liu Yao casting ships in Yaul when it launches; explore the almanac in Yuun today.
hexagram.ctaSub: Daily almanac and classical context — your entry point while Yaul is in development.

compatibility.metaDescription: Turnstile-protected elemental preview for two birthdays. Full synastry in Yuel.
compatibility.heading: Compatibility teaser · 合盘
compatibility.intro: Enter two birth dates for a lightweight elemental overlay — cultural reference for reflection, not a score or verdict.
compatibility.disclaimer: Cultural reference for reflection — not a compatibility score, verdict, or prediction.
compatibility.ctaSub: Dimensional synastry chapters, gifting, and resonance invites — cultural study, not fortune-telling.
compatibility.turnstileWait: Please wait for the security check to finish, then try again.
compatibility.error: Could not compute preview. Check network or try again later.
compatibility.turnstileHint: Person A — Turnstile runs when you reach Person B

shengXiao.metaDescription: Gregorian year to sheng xiao animal with lunar new year caveat.
shengXiao.heading: Sheng xiao year · 生肖
shengXiao.intro: Map a Gregorian year to its animal sign. Births before lunar new year belong to the prior zodiac year.
shengXiao.lunarNote: If you were born in January or early February, verify against lunar new year — the animal may be the prior year.
shengXiao.ctaSub: 黄历, personal layers, and decade timeline — your funnel into deeper chart work.
shengXiao.introPage: Twelve animals anchor Chinese New Year folklore. Serious chart work still uses Ba Zi (八字) and Zi Wei (紫微斗数) — sheng xiao alone is coarse granularity.
shengXiao.disclaimerExtended: This uses a simple Gregorian mapping. Readers born near Chinese New Year should verify with lunar/Li Chun aware software (Yuel charts do this in production).
